headline: Blockchain Technology
description: Blockchain is a distributed, immutable ledger where transactions are grouped into blocks, cryptographically linked in a chain. Satoshi Nakamoto's Bitcoin (2009) was the first. Consensus mechanisms: Proof-of-Work (Bitcoin, mining), Proof-of-Stake (Ethereum since 2022, validators stake). Blockchain = decentralized trust without intermediaries.

citation.name: Blockchain and Web3: A Developer's Guide (2025 Edition)
citation.author: multiple

citation.name: Blockchain Consensus and Applications: A 2025 Systematic Survey
citation.author: multiple
